home.heroDesc: We transform emotionally meaningful flowers into botanical art frames that last decades. We receive flowers from Portugal and all across Europe at our studio in Coimbra.
home.acompanheDesc: Once your booking is confirmed, we share every stage of the process with you, from flower arrival to the final composition. You can follow everything in real time, without having to ask.
home.recepcaoFloresDesc: We confirm receipt and assess the flowers' condition on the same day.
home.composicaoAprovadaDesc: We send a photo of the composition before framing. You always have the final say.
home.apccDesc: Part of your frame's packaging is handmade by the residents of APCC Coimbra. Each piece is unique, crafted with care exclusively for Flores à Beira-Rio.
home.pensadoReutilizarDesc: The bag protects the frame and can later be used to store clothes, beach items, whatever fits.
home.trabalhoValorSocialDesc: Each order directly supports the work and independence of APCC residents.
home.arteCoscianteDesc: Portuguese craftsmanship, zero-waste packaging, flowers preserved to last decades.
home.presenteDesc: Gift our flower preservation in the form of a gift card and let your loved ones choose the preservation they love.
home.momentoTitle: A special day deserves a special memento
home.momentoDesc: Turn a fleeting moment into a handmade work of art, to last a lifetime.
home.sustentabilidadeLink: Learn more about the origin of our materials and our sustainability policy →
home.stepsSubheading: A handcrafted process, with guidance at every stage.
home.step1Desc: Fill in the booking form to secure your slot. Dates fill up quickly.
home.step1ImgAlt: Booking calendar for flower preservation reservation
home.step2Desc: Drop off in person in Coimbra, send by post, or arrange collection at the venue.
home.step2ImgAlt: Fresh flower bouquet for botanical preservation
home.step3Desc: After composition approval, the frame is completed and delivered to your door.
home.step3ImgAlt: Framed preserved flower artwork, ready for delivery
home.maisAjudaDesc1: Schedule a free video call before placing your order.
home.maisAjudaDesc2: We can help you understand the preservation process and choose the products that best suit you. This session lasts approximately 30 minutes.
home.noivasDesc: Book your slot in advance: wedding season dates fill up quickly.

preservacao.heroDesc: We transform emotionally meaningful flowers into botanical art frames that last decades. Wedding bouquets, baptism flowers, memorial tributes, each piece is unique, handmade and professionally framed with museum glass. We receive flowers in person in Coimbra, by post, or with collection at your venue.
preservacao.oQueP1: Flower preservation is the process of transforming fresh flowers with emotional value into a botanical work of art that lasts forever.
preservacao.oQueP2: At Flores à Beira-Rio, we exclusively use artisan botanical pressing, the most natural and sustainable method. Each petal is treated individually, without resins, without synthetic chemicals, and with museum-grade conservation materials.
preservacao.oQueP3: The result is a frame with UltraVue® museum glass, ready to hang on your wall and last a lifetime.
preservacao.queTipo: What types of flowers we preserve
preservacao.paraCada: For every moment, an eternal memory
preservacao.momentosMerecem: Some moments deserve to last forever
preservacao.momentosMerecemDesc: Wedding, graduation, baptism, engagement. The flowers that were present at those moments don't have to be lost. Preserve them in a botanical work of art made to last decades.

motivos.desc: UltraVue® UV70, the same glass used in museums. Eliminates reflections and protects colours for decades.
Every petal is treated individually. No resins, no chemicals, only natural botanical pressing.
We send a photo of the composition before sealing. Nothing is final without your approval.
30% on booking, 40% when flowers arrive, 30% before delivery. Easy on the budget.
We work with clients across Europe. We receive flowers by post or in person and ship the frame anywhere.
Follow your order at any time at status.floresabeirario.pt.

ocasioes.desc: The bridal bouquet, aisle petals, altar flowers.
The flowers from the day it all began.
A memory of someone no longer with us, preserved forever.
Flowers from a moment that deserves to be eternal.
Too late? Still possible. We frame already-dried flowers.
Gift voucher for someone about to marry or celebrate.

comoFunciona.h1: From fresh flower to a forever frame
comoFunciona.heroDesc: Five steps to transform your flowers into a botanical work of art that lasts decades, explained with complete transparency.
comoFunciona.duasopcoes: When the frame is ready, you have two options:
comoFunciona.tudoIncluidoDesc: Prices start at €300, including framing and museum glass.
comoFunciona.pagamento3Desc: To keep things easy on the budget, the total is spread across the process.
comoFunciona.pag30Desc: Deposit that secures your spot. Non-refundable.
comoFunciona.pag40Desc: When the flowers arrive and we begin pressing.
comoFunciona.pag30finalDesc: After the frame is complete and before we ship it.
comoFunciona.reserveDesc: Simply fill in the booking form. We reply within 72 hours with confirmation and all instructions for the next steps.

passos.corpo: We reply within 72 hours with confirmation and 30% deposit payment instructions. Payment must be made within 24 hours to secure the booking; otherwise the appointment will be cancelled. The deposit is non-refundable.
passos.nota: Slots are limited, especially between May and September. The process starts well before the event: as soon as you know the date, secure your spot with the booking form.

passos.corpo: After the event, flowers must reach us as fresh as possible, ideally within 1 to 3 days, maximum 5. While you wait, keep the flowers in a vase with fresh water away from sun and heat. The 40% payment will be requested after we receive the flowers.

opcoes.desc: Free of charge at our atelier in Coimbra, by appointment.
Fragile and urgent post; shipping costs are the client's responsibility.
We travel to the venue, subject to quote and availability.

passos.corpo: This is where the magic happens and the part that cannot be rushed. Every petal, leaf and sprig is pressed individually under controlled temperature and humidity conditions.
passos.nota: After preservation, the flowers are also frozen to eliminate any insects that may still be present.

passos.corpo: We select the best-preserved flowers and begin creating your frame. When the composition is ready, you will receive an email with design photos.
passos.nota: You will have 72 hours to approve or request changes. After the frame is complete and before we ship it.

passos.corpo: Before shipping or collection, the 3rd and final instalment of 30% will be requested. The frame includes care instructions to ensure its longevity.

opcoes.desc: You will receive a tracking number as soon as the order is dispatched. Shipping costs are the client's responsibility.
Schedule a time to collect in Coimbra.

incluidos.desc: The same glass used in museums. Blocks UV rays that fade colours.
We send a photo. Nothing is final without your approval.
It's not just drying flowers. It's creating a thoughtful composition.
Updates throughout the process. You're never left wondering.

opcoes.heroDesc: Each frame is a unique piece, handmade in Coimbra. Choose the background, size and details that make your composition truly yours.

fundos.title: Glass on Glass
fundos.desc: The flowers are suspended between two panes of glass, with no opaque background. A light and modern effect, ideal for bright spaces.

fundos.title: Photo Background
fundos.desc: A landscape, a portrait, or any image with special meaning. The photograph is professionally printed.

fundos.title: Coloured Background
fundos.desc: We apply any background colour to enhance the flowers. We suggest tones that complement the bouquet's colour palette.

fundos.title: White Background
fundos.desc: Minimalist and timeless. Naturally enhances the colours and forms of the flowers with maximum simplicity.

opcoes.presentesDesc: In addition to your main frame, you can order additional pieces. Personal and meaningful gifts for those you love.

presentes.title: 20×25 cm
presentes.desc: A frame with the flowers from your bouquet to give to family members, godparents or bridesmaids. A gift with memory and meaning.
presentes.note: Only with the purchase of a larger frame.

presentes.title: Christmas Ornament
presentes.desc: For yourself or as a gift. A piece of your special day to decorate the Christmas of those you love, year after year.
presentes.note: Only with the purchase of a larger frame.

presentes.title: Pendant Necklace
presentes.desc: A flower from your bouquet to wear always close to your heart. A memory transformed into jewellery.
presentes.note: Only with the purchase of a larger frame.

opcoes.elementosNote: If the accessories are more bulky, the frame depth will be adjusted and the quote recalculated.
opcoes.precosDesc: Each frame we create is unique. Handmade, with attention to detail and dedication to the story behind the flowers.
opcoes.escolhaLabel: Choose the size of the frame where your preserved flowers will be displayed:
opcoes.complementeLabel: Complement your order with other formats, for yourself or as a gift, with your preserved flowers:

frames.desc: The most chosen format. A subtle balance between simplicity and detail, where each flower finds its place.
A statement piece, that commands any wall.
Only available with the purchase of a larger frame.
Christmas ornament with double lead-free soldered glass with silver. Only available with the purchase of a larger frame.
Pendant with double lead-free soldered glass with silver. Only available with the purchase of a larger frame.

opcoes.outroFormato: Do you need a different format or a different composition?
opcoes.jaEncomendou: Already ordered? Track the status of your piece in real time.
opcoes.materiaisDesc: Each piece is produced with museum conservation materials, selected to ensure your flowers remain beautiful over the years.
opcoes.phEnd: the same materials used in museums and archives to preserve works over decades.
vidroFeatures: Filters up to 70% of harmful UV rays
Water White glass with crystal-clear colour transmission

opcoes.recriacaoDesc: In addition to preservation, we recreate your original bouquet with fresh or dried flowers, to relive the moment as if it were today.

bouquetNoiva.heroDesc: We transform your wedding bouquet into a botanical work of art that lasts decades. Artisan pressing, anti-UV museum glass and handmade framing in Coimbra. We receive bouquets in person, by post, or with collection at your venue.
bouquetNoiva.contentTitle: The bouquet that was there for your vows
bouquetNoiva.p1: The wedding bouquet is, for many couples, the most symbolic piece of the wedding day. Instead of watching it wilt over the following days, you can transform it into a botanical art frame that lasts decades, ready to hang on the wall at home.
bouquetNoiva.p2: The process starts with booking the date, ideally as soon as you know when the wedding is. In the days following the ceremony, you hand us the bouquet and we take care of everything: petal-by-petal pressing, artistic composition, approval by you, and framing with anti-UV museum glass. You can also include the wedding invitation, handwritten vows, ribbons, or any meaningful element in the composition.
bouquetNoiva.ctaDesc: Slots are limited, especially between May and September. We recommend booking as soon as you know the wedding date. Prices from €300, with payment in three instalments.

features.titulo: Hand in the bouquet within 5 days
features.desc: After the wedding, send us the bouquet as quickly as possible. Ideally 1 to 3 days; we accept up to 5 days after the ceremony. While you wait, keep it in a vase with fresh water, away from heat and sunlight.
When the composition is ready, you receive photos by email and have 72 hours to approve or request changes. Nothing is final without your approval.
UltraVue® anti-UV glass, acid-free card and adhesive, frame made to measure in Coimbra. The same materials used in museums and professional archives.

bouquetNoiva.beforeAfterTitle: From fresh bouquet to botanical frame
bouquetNoiva.beforeAfterDesc: Every petal is treated individually, pressed and composed by hand. The result is a piece that lasts decades, ready to hang on the wall at home.
bouquetNoiva.beforeAfterAlt: Before and after: fresh wedding bouquet and the same transformed into a botanical art frame
galleryAlts: Couple on their wedding day with bouquet
Pressed flower composition with glass over glass
Wedding flower frame with black moulding
Close-up of pressed flowers in botanical composition

processSteps.title: Book before the wedding
processSteps.desc: Slots are limited, especially between May and September. Book as soon as you know the date, we hold your place with no immediate commitment.

processSteps.title: Hand in the bouquet in the days following
processSteps.desc: After the ceremony, hand in the bouquet ideally within 1 to 3 days, up to a maximum of 5. We receive bouquets at the weekend, including Sunday. You don't need to wait until Monday.

processSteps.title: Approve the composition
processSteps.desc: We send you photographs of the composition by email. You have 72 hours to approve or request changes. Nothing is final without your explicit approval.

processSteps.title: Receive the frame at home
processSteps.desc: The framed piece arrives carefully packaged, ready to hang. We ship across Europe.

bouquetNoiva.weekendBadge: We receive bouquets at the weekend, including Sunday
bouquetNoiva.weekendNote: You don't need to wait until Monday to contact us or hand in the bouquet. We are available on Saturdays and Sundays, because that is when weddings happen.

faqItems.q: How can I hand in the bouquet?
faqItems.a: You can drop it off in person in Coimbra, send it by express courier, or request collection from a location by our team (subject to availability). We receive bouquets Monday to Sunday, including weekends.

faqItems.q: Do you receive bouquets at the weekend, including Sunday?
faqItems.a: Yes. We know most weddings take place on Saturdays or Sundays, so we are available at the weekend to receive your bouquet. You don't need to wait until Monday to contact us or make the handover.

faqItems.q: What is the maximum time to hand in the bouquet after the wedding?
faqItems.a: We accept bouquets up to 5 days after the ceremony. Ideally within 1 to 3 days: the fresher the bouquet, the more compositional options are available.

faqItems.q: How should I keep the bouquet until I hand it in?
faqItems.a: Place it in a vase with fresh water, away from heat and direct sunlight. Do not refrigerate it. If possible, trim the stems slightly before placing them in water.

faqItems.q: What else can I include in the frame?
faqItems.a: You can include the wedding invitation, handwritten vows, bouquet ribbons, a photograph, a piece of jewellery, a letter, or any meaningful element. Tell us what you have in mind and we will find a way to incorporate it.

faqItems.q: How long does the process take?
faqItems.a: The full process (pressing, composition, approval and framing) takes 6 to 8 weeks. When the composition is ready, you will receive photos by email and have 72 hours to approve or request changes. Larger works or those with additional elements may take slightly longer.

faqItems.q: What are the prices and how does payment work?
faqItems.a: Prices start from €300. See the options and pricing page for all available formats and finishes. Payment is made in three instalments: 30% to book your date, 40% when you approve the composition, and 30% on delivery.

Yes. We ship across Europe: Spain, France, United Kingdom, Ireland, Italy, Belgium, Netherlands, Germany, Austria and Switzerland, among others. We also ship to the United States, Canada and China. Shipping includes insurance and specialist packaging.

bouquetNoiva.pricingCtaDesc: Before booking, please browse all available formats: sizes, finishes and prices. Essential reading to choose the right frame for your wedding.

lutoHomenagem.heroDesc: Immortalise flowers from a funeral ceremony as a lasting tribute. A permanent gesture of love, preserved with full respect and sensitivity.
lutoHomenagem.p1: Flowers present at a farewell ceremony carry deep meaning. Preserving them is a way to keep the memory of the departed alive, transforming them into a piece of botanical art that can remain at home as a silent and permanent tribute.
lutoHomenagem.p2: Every petal is treated individually by artisan pressing and framed with anti-UV museum glass and a custom-made mount in Coimbra. You can also include a photograph, a card or any element that holds meaning for you.
lutoHomenagem.ctaFinalTitle: Preserve the memory of a loved one
lutoHomenagem.ctaDesc: Contact us when the time feels right. Prices from €300, with payment in three instalments. We ship across Europe.

features.desc: We treat every order of this kind with special attention. We know what it represents and we work with the respect and discretion the circumstances require.
Ideally deliver the flowers within the first 1 to 3 days after the ceremony. If the deadline has passed, contact us to discuss options, including recreation with fresh flowers.

If this is not the right moment to think about it, there is no rush. Flowers can be recreated with similar fresh flowers, even if the originals have already wilted. We are here whenever you are ready.

batizadoNascimento.heroDesc: Baptism and birth flowers deserve to be kept forever. We preserve every petal in botanical art that accompanies your child throughout life.
batizadoNascimento.contentTitle: The first bouquet of a whole life
batizadoNascimento.p1: The birth of a child or the baptism day are moments that mark the very beginning. The flowers that accompanied them carry the emotion of those first days and deserve more than a week in a vase.
batizadoNascimento.p2: Through artisan botanical pressing, we transform those flowers into a handmade frame, mounted with anti-UV museum glass and a custom-made surround in Coimbra. Simply hand us the flowers in the days following the ceremony and we take care of everything, including shipping the finished frame to your address. It is also an original and lasting gift for godparents or family members who want to mark the occasion.
batizadoNascimento.ctaFinalTitle: Preserve the start of the story
batizadoNascimento.ctaDesc: Baptism and birth flowers don't have to live only in photographs. Prices from €300, with payment in three instalments.

features.desc: We preserve baptism bouquets, flowers given at the hospital, or nursery decorations. Any flower from those early days can be transformed into art.

features.titulo: A piece that grows with your child
features.desc: The frame that decorates the nursery today becomes, over time, an adult keepsake full of meaning. A memory for life.
You can add the hospital wristband, a photograph, ribbons, or any meaningful element to the frame. The composition is always approved by you.

aniversario.p2: Simply hand us the flowers in the days following the anniversary (up to 5 days, ideally 1 to 3). We handle the pressing, artistic composition, approval with you, and framing with anti-UV museum glass and a custom-made mount in Coimbra.

pedidoCasamento.heroDesc: The proposal flowers mark the start of a story. Preserve that moment in a botanical work of art handmade in Coimbra, with anti-UV museum glass.
pedidoCasamento.p1: There is a date before the wedding that is often forgotten: the proposal day. The flowers that were there that night deserve to be kept with the same care as the wedding bouquet.
pedidoCasamento.p2: Hand us the flowers in the days following the proposal (up to 5 days, ideally 1 to 3) and we transform them into a botanical art frame. Every petal is pressed individually, the composition is approved by you, and the result is framed with anti-UV museum glass and a custom-made mount in Coimbra.
pedidoCasamento.ctaDesc: Proposal flowers deserve to be preserved before they dry. Prices from €300, with payment in three instalments.

features.titulo: No need to wait for the wedding
features.desc: Preserve the proposal flowers as soon as you can, in the days following the moment. Later, you can also preserve the wedding bouquet.
The proposal frame and the bouquet frame, together on the wall, tell the full story from the very first yes. Many couples choose to preserve both.

features.desc: A photograph of the moment, the note that came with the flowers, the ribbon from the box. Any meaningful element can be part of the frame.

emoldurar.heroEyebrow: Frame the most beautiful chapter of your story
emoldurar.heroDesc: Many bouquets dried naturally over time. Some were originally created with dried flowers. At Flores à Beira-Rio, we can transform that bouquet into a framed piece.

opcoes.desc: If you dried your flowers naturally, or your bouquet was originally made of dried flowers, we can frame it. Either as a bouquet or deconstructed into a composition with the flowers surrounding a photograph, for example.
opcoes.detalhe: Deep frame with 4.5 cm of useful height.

opcoes.desc: If you no longer have your flowers or they are no longer in good condition, we recreate the bouquet with fresh flowers and preserve it in a framed piece. The colours are preserved and closer to the original day. Two-dimensional composition, shallow frame.
opcoes.detalhe: Visit our recreation page for more details.

opcoes.desc: If you still have some original flowers from the special day, but some did not dry well, this is the perfect solution: we use the original flowers that are still in good condition and replace the rest. The frame combines elements from the original bouquet with pressed flower replicas in a balanced composition.

emoldurar.fotoEyebrow: A detail that makes a difference
emoldurar.fotoDesc: In any of the three options, we can integrate a photograph into the composition: from the wedding, the christening, or any image with special meaning. The frame becomes even more unique.

pagamento.desc: After approval of the final composition.

faqs.q: Can I frame a wedding bouquet that has already dried?
faqs.a: Yes, and that is exactly what this service is for. Many bouquets arrive years after the wedding, and we can work with them. If the bouquet already has some damaged flowers, we can combine the original elements with pressed flower replicas that preserve their original colours.

faqs.q: Do you accept bouquets from other cities or countries?
faqs.a: Yes. We work with clients from across Europe. The bouquet can be sent by courier or fragile post. Postage costs are the client's responsibility.

faqs.q: Does the bouquet have to be in perfect condition?
faqs.a: No. We work with whatever arrives. If some flowers are no longer in good condition, we can replace those elements with similar preserved pressed flowers. The final result is always harmonious. In these cases, preservation prices apply

faqs.q: How do I know what stage my frame is at?
faqs.a: You can track your order at any time at status.floresabeirario.pt, a dedicated page for monitoring each ongoing piece.

faqs.q: Can I include a photograph in the frame?
faqs.a: Yes. In any option you can request that we include a photograph in the composition, from the wedding, the christening, or any other image with special meaning.

meta.title: Sustainability | Flores à Beira-Rio, Flower Preservation
meta.description: Learn about Flores à Beira-Rio's commitment to sustainability: natural pressing without resins, museum materials, artisan social packaging and partnership with APCC Coimbra.
meta.ogTitle: Sustainability | Flores à Beira-Rio
meta.ogDescription: Conscious botanical art: no resins, museum materials and artisan packaging through a social partnership.
meta.ogImageAlt: Sustainability in flower preservation, Flores à Beira-Rio
meta.keywords: sustainable flower preservation, natural botanical pressing, no resin flowers, eco friendly flower art, museum materials flowers

sustentabilidade.heroDesc: At Flores à Beira-Rio, preserving flowers also means preserving the planet. No petrochemical resins, no industrial silica: only handcrafted botanical pressing with museum-conservation materials.
sustentabilidade.filosofiaP1: When we receive flowers from a meaningful moment, the responsibility is not only artistic, it is also environmental.
sustentabilidade.filosofiaP2: That is why we choose, and will continue to choose, handcrafted botanical pressing as our exclusive working method. It is a slower and more demanding technique, but the results speak for themselves: natural beauty, longevity, and a process that respects the integrity of the flower and the planet.
sustentabilidade.apccDesc: Part of the packaging that protects your frame is handmade by the users of the Weaving and Sewing Workshop of the Coimbra Cerebral Palsy Association, under the Mão Doida brand.

apccTopics.title: Direct and ongoing impact
apccTopics.desc: Every order directly supports the work and autonomy of the users of the Coimbra Cerebral Palsy Association. This is not a one-off initiative, it is part of our business model.

apccTopics.title: Designed to be reused
apccTopics.desc: The bag that protects your frame can afterwards be used to store clothes, beach items, or whatever fits.

sustentabilidade.comparacaoDesc: The three most popular methods for preserving flowers forever. Here is why we choose pressing.

methods.title: Botanical Pressing
methods.subtitle: Handcrafted. Natural.
points: Flowers retain their real, organic essence.
100% mechanical process. Generates no toxic waste.
Biodegradable materials at end of useful life.
methods.verdict: The most sustainable and careful choice for the flowers and the planet.

methods.title: Epoxy Resin
methods.subtitle: Encapsulated petrochemical plastic.
points: Synthetic polymer derived from petroleum, not biodegradable.
Releases toxic VOCs during curing and production.
Remains in the environment for hundreds of years.
Difficult or impossible to restore if damaged.
Requires strict PPE: chemical vapour filter mask, nitrile gloves and safety glasses.
methods.verdict: Harmful to health and the environment.

methods.title: Silica Gel
methods.subtitle: Industrial.
points: Industrial production with high energy consumption.
Versions with cobalt chloride are toxic to aquatic life.
Air-drying is an alternative, but does not preserve original colours, so we do not consider it a comparable professional preservation method.

values.title: Local framing
values.desc: Frames are made by a local Portuguese framing workshop, using high-quality lacquered wood and materials. Each frame is produced to measure for the piece it will hold.

values.title: Local art in every detail
values.desc: We support local Portuguese artists who created the graphic elements of our brand, including the card included in packaging and the gift voucher.

values.title: Zero aggressive chemicals
values.desc: Botanical pressing uses no solvents, resins or synthetic substances. The process combines pressure, controlled heat and time. Nothing is added to the flower.

values.title: Packaging designed to be reused
values.desc: We aim for most packaging elements to have a second life, and for the minimum necessary waste to be discarded immediately.

values.title: Integrated social impact
values.desc: Every order directly supports the work and autonomy of the users of the Coimbra Cerebral Palsy Association. It is not a one-off action, it is part of our business model.

values.title: Museum UltraVue® UV70 glass
values.desc: The same glass used in museums and galleries. Filters 70% of UV rays and eliminates glare, keeping colours vibrant for decades.

values.title: The plastic we still use
values.desc: To ensure your frame arrives in perfect condition, we still use inflatable padding to protect the glass. We are actively testing 100% sustainable alternatives.

sustentabilidade.ctaDesc: Fill in the form and we will get in touch to arrange all the details. Estimated delivery: 4 to 6 weeks after we receive the flowers.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Flores à Beira-Rio
meta.description: Flores à Beira-Rio privacy policy. How we collect, use and protect your personal data. GDPR compliance.
meta.ogTitle: Privacy Policy | Flores à Beira-Rio
meta.ogDescription: How we collect, use and protect your data. GDPR compliance.
meta.ogImageAlt: Privacy policy, Flores à Beira-Rio

privacidade.intro: At Flores à Beira-Rio, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights as the data subject.

sections.title: 1. Data Controller
sections.content:
Flores à Beira-Rio
NIF: 236533550
Location: Ceira, Coimbra, Portugal
Email: info@floresabeirario.pt

sections.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
sections.content:
We may collect the following personal data, provided directly by you:
• Full name
• Email address
• Mobile number
• NIF (only if you request an invoice)
• Photographs of flowers or frames (if you choose to share them voluntarily)

sections.title: 3. How We Collect Data
sections.content:
Your data may be collected through the following means:
• Booking forms (via Monday.com)
• Messages via WhatsApp, email, phone or Messenger

sections.title: 4. Purposes of Processing
sections.content:
We use your data only for the following purposes:
• Processing and managing bookings
• Communication throughout the preservation and delivery process
• Issuing invoices, if requested
• Shipping the finished frame by post (with your consent and instructions)

sections.title: 5. Sharing Data with Third Parties
sections.content:
Your data is not shared with third parties, except in the following cases:
• CTT (Portuguese postal service): only if you choose to receive your frame by post, and only with the data strictly necessary for delivery.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content: Data will be retained only for as long as necessary to provide the requested service and will be deleted once it is no longer needed for that purpose.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content:
Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
• Access your personal data
• Request the rectification or deletion of your data
• Withdraw your consent at any time
• Object to the processing of your data
• Lodge a complaint with the National Data Protection Commission (CNPD)

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at info@floresabeirario.pt.

sections.title: 8. Cookies
sections.content: Currently, the Flores à Beira-Rio website does not use cookies to collect data.

meta.title: Terms and Conditions | Flores à Beira-Rio
meta.description: Terms and conditions of the Flores à Beira-Rio flower preservation service. Please read before ordering.
meta.ogTitle: Terms and Conditions | Flores à Beira-Rio
meta.ogDescription: Terms and conditions of the Flores à Beira-Rio flower preservation service.
meta.ogImageAlt: Terms and conditions, Flores à Beira-Rio

termos.intro: By booking Flores à Beira-Rio services, the client declares to have read, understood and accepted these Terms and Conditions.

sections.title: 1. Nature of the Service
sections.content: Flores à Beira-Rio is dedicated to the artisanal preservation of natural flowers through pressing and drying techniques, transforming flowers with emotional or symbolic value into personalised framed pieces. All pieces are unique and handmade. The nature of this process implies variability in the final result, which the client accepts at the time of booking.

sections.title: 2. Natural Changes in Flowers
sections.content: When pressed or dried, flowers may change significantly in colour, shape or texture. Certain tones (reds, purples, strong pinks and whites) tend to darken, yellow or fade. These changes are natural and are not considered defects or grounds for a refund.

sections.title: 3. Shipping and Condition of Flowers
sections.content: Flowers are preserved in the condition in which they arrive at our studio. The client must send them within the recommended timeframe (1 to 3 days after the event). We are not responsible for damage caused during transport or postal delays.

sections.title: 4. Instructions and Preferences
sections.content: Specific requests regarding the design must be sent in physical form inside the package or by email before the flowers are received. The inclusion of all elements is not guaranteed and depends on technical feasibility.

sections.title: 5. Frames and Final Composition
sections.content: Frames are handmade using museum-quality materials. The client will have 72 hours to approve the final design via photographs. Once sealed, the frame cannot be altered.

sections.title: 6. Payments
sections.content:
The service is paid in three instalments:
1st: 30% at the time of booking (non-refundable).
2nd: 40% upon receipt of the flowers.
3rd: 30% before shipping or collection.

sections.title: 7. Delivery of the Finished Piece
sections.content: The piece can be sent by tracked post or collected in Coimbra. Shipping only takes place after full payment.

sections.title: 8. Damage and Claims
sections.content: If the frame arrives damaged, the client must contact us within 7 days and keep the original packaging for assessment.

sections.title: 9. Cancellations and Refunds
sections.content: The 30% deposit is non-refundable in the event of cancellation by the client. If the event is rescheduled, the deposit may be transferred subject to availability.

sections.title: 10. Care of the Piece
sections.content: Avoid direct sunlight, humidity (bathrooms/kitchens) and extreme heat sources to ensure the durability of the frame.

sections.title: 11. Privacy Policy
sections.content: Data processing is carried out in compliance with the GDPR. Details can be found on our Privacy Policy page.

sections.title: 12. Copyright
